headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Digital Realty Trust (DLR) After Its Strong Year To Date Run
summary: If you are wondering whether Digital Realty Trust is still attractively priced after its recent run, the next sections will walk through what the current share price might be implying. The stock closed at US$190.65, with the share price up 23.0% year to date and 17.3% over the past year. More recently it has fallen 1.4% over the last week and 6.5% over the past month, which can change how you think about risk and upside. Over the past few months, Digital Realty Trust has stayed in focus as...
